violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Name of chemical to be added to spray bottles New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The dumpsters (grease and refuse) outside is located on stone. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The doorway casing and the wall in the ice machine area is covered with bare wood that is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Wooden surfaces are to be sealed with an epoxy paint to meet proper indoor surface characteristics (smooth durable, easily cleanable) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (Currently directly connected to drain). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. A proper air gap is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The dumpster outside is located on stone. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The doorway casing and the wall in the ice machine area is covered with bare wood that is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Wooden surfaces are to be sealed with an epoxy paint to meet proper indoor surface characteristics (smooth durable, easily cleanable) New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The ceiling sealed coating in the kitchen area was observed to be scratched scored with some peeling. The ceiling coating is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Shellfish tags were observed not marked with the last date of use. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The floor covering in the area of the ice machine is observed to be in poor repair (peeled up/missing) exposing the subflooring to moisture. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor covering is to be maintained as durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
